title: China-to-Israel Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC - IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: PV inverters supplied into Israel should be documented with EMC evidence aligned to the current Israeli Standard or IEC references required by SII, the project owner, and the connection reviewer. The common international package for PV power conversion equipment is IEC 62920 for EMC requirements and test methods, with relevant IEC 61000-series immunity, emission, harmonic, and flicker tests depending on equipment rating and installation context. Because SII mandatory standards often adopt or reference IEC standards, exporters should confirm whether the current Israeli Standard route requires SII testing, recognition of foreign reports, or supplementary local documentation.
target_standards: IEC 62920 - Photovoltaic power generating systems - EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series - Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic current emission and flicker where applicable
Current Israeli Standard / SII mandatory-standard route for the relevant inverter type - confirm before import
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and related China domestic EMC references. These reports may be useful for engineering comparison, but they are not proof that the inverter has passed IEC 62920, the relevant IEC 61000 limits, or an SII-recognized Israeli Standard route. If Chinese reports were run at China default voltage or firmware settings, the results may also fail to reflect Israel project configuration.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China domestic EMC files should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, rating, firmware family, and grid configuration. Before import or tender submission, confirm with SII or the importer whether the reports must be issued by a specific accredited laboratory, whether report recognition is available, and whether Hebrew labeling or importer declaration documents are required.

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory where EMC evidence is part of the applicable Israeli Standard, SII import release, tender specification, or grid-connection review; confirm current SII route for the product scope
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic EMC evidence supports China-side certification or tender review but does not by itself establish Israel/SII compliance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports as Israel/SII evidence. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter configuration, then confirm with SII or the Israel importer whether the reports are acceptable for the current mandatory-standard or import-release route.

rows.requirement: Israel Grid-Connection Review - IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
rows.target_requirement: Solar PV inverters for Israel projects should be treated as requiring both product conformity evidence and project-level grid-connection approval. The Israel Electricity Authority regulates electricity-sector arrangements, while utility interconnection review checks that distributed-generation equipment meets applicable grid-interface requirements. Practical inverter evidence normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding testing, IEC 61727 photovoltaic system grid-interface compliance, protection settings, reconnection behavior, and firmware validation for Israel's low-voltage supply of 230/400 V at 50 Hz. The current Israeli Standard references and any project-specific utility settings must be confirmed before shipment or commissioning.
target_standards: Israel Electricity Authority distributed-generation and connection arrangements - confirm current applicable decision and utility procedure before project submission
IEC 62116 - Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters - Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 - Photovoltaic systems - Characteristics of the utility interface
Israel low-voltage supply basis for equipment configuration: 230/400 V, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or protection-test reports. Those documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and Chinese review processes. They do not prove compliance with Israel Electricity Authority connection conditions, utility protection settings, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, or Israel 230/400 V grid parameters.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 - 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid files do not transfer to Israel grid-connection acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence for the specific inverter model, protection-setting tables, firmware version records, and a project-specific statement showing 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration. Confirm whether the utility or project engineer requires additional local witness testing, parameter locking, or approval documentation before commissioning.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected PV projects because connection approval and utility commissioning are project gates; exact evidence package depends on the current Israel Electricity Authority arrangement and utility procedure
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may support China domestic review but is not accepted as Israel Electricity Authority or utility approval evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, and Israel-specific 230/400 V 50 Hz firmware settings as separate Israel grid-connection evidence. Do not present GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 documents as Israel Electricity Authority or utility approval. Confirm the current Electricity Authority connection arrangement and utility commissioning checklist before shipping the inverter or locking firmware parameters.

rows.requirement: SI / IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence - SII Mandatory-Standard Gate
rows.target_requirement: SII is Israel's national standards body and operates testing, certification, and importer services for products subject to Israeli Standards and mandatory-standard controls. For PV inverters, the core safety evidence should be mapped to the current Israeli Standard adoption or reference for IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2. SII or the importer should confirm whether the inverter is regulated as an imported electrical product requiring SII conformity review, whether foreign CB/IEC reports can be recognized, and whether additional model, label, instruction, or Hebrew documentation checks apply.
target_standards: Current Israeli Standard route for PV inverter safety - confirm SI adoption or reference before import
IEC 62109-1 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SII importer testing and certification process for goods subject to Israeli Standards
rows.china_equivalent: China-side inverter safety files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC/CGC certification, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents may show China domestic design and testing history, but they are not Israel/SII approval evidence and should not be presented as a substitute for SI / IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence or SII import-release documentation.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: A China-only GB/T or NB/T safety file does not establish compliance with SII's current Israeli Standard route. Exporters should compile IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and test reports covering the specific model or model family, bill of materials and critical components, ratings, firmware and hardware revisions, installation instructions, markings, and importer documentation. Before shipment, confirm with SII whether the product is under a mandatory standard, which import group or release route applies, and whether supplementary testing in Israel is required.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter falls under an applicable mandatory Israeli Standard or SII import-release route; also commonly required by project owners and connection reviewers for grid-connected PV projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 are China-side baseline evidence and are not accepted as Israel/SII safety approval evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan for SII route confirmation and SI / IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence before importing a China-made PV inverter into Israel. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC, CGC, or CNAS files can support technical background but should not be represented as Israel/SII approval. Confirm mandatory-standard scope, report-recognition options, label and Hebrew-documentation requirements directly with SII or the appointed Israel importer.
